title: Set Islemleri
subtitle: Kume operasyonlari: birlesim, kesisim, fark.
code:
fruits_a = {"elma", "armut", "muz", "karpuz"}
fruits_b = {"muz", "karpuz", "uzum", "kiraz"}

print("Set A:", fruits_a)
print("Set B:", fruits_b)

# Birlesim
union = fruits_a | fruits_b
print("\nBirlesim (A | B):", union)

# Kesisim
intersection = fruits_a & fruits_b
print("Kesisim (A & B):", intersection)

# Fark
difference = fruits_a - fruits_b
print("Fark (A - B):", difference)

# Simetrik fark
sym_diff = fruits_a ^ fruits_b
print("Simetrik fark (A ^ B):", sym_diff)

# Eleman ekleme/cikarma
fruits_a.add("ananas")
print("\nAnanas eklendi:", fruits_a)

fruits_a.discard("elma")
print("Elma cikarildi:", fruits_a)

# Liste -> Set (tekrarlari kaldirma)
numbers = [1, 2, 2, 3, 3, 3, 4, 5, 5]
unique_numbers = set(numbers)
print("\nOrijinal liste:", numbers)
print("Benzersiz elemanlar:", unique_numbers)

# Kontrol
print("\n'muz' set A'da var mi:", "muz" in fruits_a)
